title: Ubiquiti CKG2-RM - Rack Mount for Cloud Key G2
category: Ubiquiti CKG2-RM - Rack Mount for Cloud Key G2
description: The CKG2-RM is an accessory for CloudKey G2, CloudKey G2 Plus, and is used to install these devices in a 19" rack. In addition to rack mounting, the LAN port, reset button and LED status can be brought to the front of the panel. LAN port is possible to use on back side of Cloud Key or on the front side of pannel but not both at the same time CKG2-RM 19" pannel Rackmount screws
specsSearch: Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (1) 10/100/1000Mbps Gigabit LAN Yes Power Power over Ethernet 802.3af Power type PoE, USB-C Max. power consumption [W] 5
